heading: Definition
label: 40101 Definition
text: For purposes of this chapter, “State” includes the District of Columbia and the territories and possessions of the United States.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)4010136:2613., , .Aug. 17, 1984Pub. L. 98–382, § 1498 Stat. 1345The words “the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico” are omitted as included in “the territories and possession of the United States”.
